# Lyrics

Song lyrics storage and retrieval. Integrates with the [LRCLIB API](https://lrclib.net/docs) to fetch both plain and synced/timed lyrics (LRC format). Full four-layer DDD structure.

## Concepts

The `Lyrics` aggregate stores lyrics indexed by song ID, supporting multiple sources (embedded tags, LRCLIB, Musixmatch, Genius). Each record holds both `plainLyrics` and `syncedLyrics` (LRC format with `[mm:ss.xx]` timestamps for karaoke-style display). An optional `lrclibId` tracks the external LRCLIB record for deduplication.

**Aggregate root:** `Lyrics` (state object pattern via `LyricsState`)

**LRCLIB integration strategy:**
- On-demand fetch: cached endpoint (`/api/get-cached`) first for predictable latency, fallback to full (`/api/get`) on 404
- Search fallback: manual keyword search via `/api/search` when auto-match by track signature fails
- Bulk scan: console command iterates songs without lyrics and fetches from LRCLIB

## Ports

| Port | Layer | Purpose |
|------|-------|---------|
| `LyricsPortInterface` | Application | Lyrics CRUD + LRCLIB orchestration (fetch, search, apply) |
| `LrclibClientInterface` | Application | LRCLIB HTTP API contract (getBySignature, search, getById) |

## Events

No domain events published yet.

## Interactions

### API Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/songs/{publicId}/lyrics` | Get cached lyrics for a song |
| POST | `/api/songs/{publicId}/lyrics/fetch` | Trigger on-demand LRCLIB fetch |
| GET | `/api/lyrics/search?q=...` | Search LRCLIB |
| POST | `/api/lyrics/search/{resultId}/apply` | Apply search result to a song |

### Console Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `baander:lyrics:fetch` | Bulk-fetch lyrics from LRCLIB for songs missing them |

### Cross-Context Dependencies

| Dependency | Layer | Purpose |
|------------|-------|---------|
| `Catalog\Application\Port\SongPortInterface` | Application, Interface | Song metadata (title, duration, artist name) for LRCLIB signature lookup |
| `Catalog\Application\Port\AlbumPortInterface` | Application, Infrastructure | Album name for LRCLIB signature lookup |

### Anti-Corruption Layer

LRCLIB API is isolated behind `LrclibClientInterface` → `LrclibClient` (Symfony HttpClient). The application layer never depends on external API details.
